scripts.postinstall: cd contracts && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dev:deploy: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:node" "wait-on tcp:8545 && npm run dev:deploy" "wait-on tcp:8545 && wait-on backend/.deploy-ready && npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
